summary: Iter7 production bug-fix round verified. 18/18 backend pytest cases pass covering: expanded /notifications/counts (8 keys + numeric types), follow→new_followers increment, DM→unread_dms increment, /notifications/mark-seen reset, /users/me/followers + /users/me/following privacy (auth-required, scoped-to-self, contains expected handles, count==len), /users/by-handle privacy (no follower_count/following_count leak), /admin/promote (200 happy-path, 403 for non-admin, 400 missing email, 404 unknown email), /admin/purge-demo-accounts (alice & teen purged, seeded admin survives self-protection even with include_seeded_admin=true), and SEED_DEMO_DATA=1 reseed after supervisorctl restart. Source-level verification of Profile.jsx confirms counters render ONLY when isMyProfile=true (privacy preserved on /u/{handle}). Visual screenshot of /register confirms '# handle' shows clear separation between '#' prefix (left-3) and input text area (pl-7 = 28px) — fix CSS layer ordering for cc-input is working. NOTE: Playwright frontend automation tool appears to f-string-substitute the script parameter, breaking any script containing curly braces in dict literals or JS arrow functions — see context_for_next_testing_agent.
action_items: Main agent can self-verify the four frontend flows (mobile bell dot, desktop sidebar pill, /me counters, /me/followers list) by logging in as alice in a browser — backend integration is proven working via pytest and source review.
Re-seed safety net is in place: SEED_DEMO_DATA=1 in /app/backend/.env causes alice/bob/teen/admin to be recreated on supervisor restart (verified end-to-end in test_zzz_reseed_via_restart).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:2008-2026 — DEMO_EMAILS hard-coded to alice/bob/teen and SEEDED_ADMIN_EMAIL excluded from base list. Self-protection via 'if u.user_id == admin.user_id: continue' is correct; verified the calling admin survives even when include_seeded_admin=true.

server.py:2139 last_seen default '2000-01-01T00:00:00+00:00' means a brand-new user (no notifications_seen_at) will see ALL prior followers as 'new' until first mark-seen call. Consider initializing notifications_seen_at at signup time so the badge is empty for net-new accounts.

server.py:2180,2192 — /users/me/followers and /me/following return up to 500 entries with no pagination. For users with >500 follows this list is silently truncated. Add skip/limit query params or cursor pagination if a power-user has more.
Profile.jsx:153 privacy gate uses `isMyProfile && myCounts.followers !== null`. Correct — counters cannot render on /u/{handle}. Good defense-in-depth pairing with backend /me/* scope.
server.py:2042 — group_chats $pull removes from members AND pending_invites in ONE update; correct for purge but ensure indices on these arrays in production for perf.

TOOLING: mcp_browser_automation appears to f-string-substitute the script parameter, so any single `{` or `}` in a dict literal or JS object literal throws TokenError. Worked around with screenshots + backend pytest. Tool-side fix recommended.

success_rate.frontend: Visual confirmation: /register '# handle' field shows correct prefix separation. Source-code verified: Profile.jsx privacy gate, BottomNav data-testid, Search.jsx pl-12. Live Playwright run blocked by tooling bug.

test_credentials: alice@clanchat.app/Password123!, bob@clanchat.app/Password123! (now ADMIN after promote test), admin@clanchat.app/admin123 — all re-seeded and verified working post-purge+restart
seed_data_creation: Test created one TEST DM from bob→alice ('TEST iter7 dm'), enabled alice's dms_enabled_followers=true setting, and promoted bob to admin role. After the purge test, alice and teen were deleted, then supervisor restart re-seeded all four demo accounts cleanly. Bob remains promoted to admin (not reverted) — main agent may want to demote if they want a clean preview state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test_iter7_notif_followers_admin.py is the regression suite for iter7. The TestZZZPurgeDemoLast class MUST run last (alphabetical ordering ensures this) because it wipes alice/teen and restarts backend to reseed. If you need to run just the privacy/notif tests without the destructive purge: pytest backend/tests/test_iter7_notif_followers_admin.py::TestNotificationsCounts backend/tests/test_iter7_notif_followers_admin.py::TestFollowersFollowingLists. KNOWN TOOLING BUG: mcp_browser_automation script parameter f-string-substitutes braces, so `{"x":0}` becomes a SyntaxError or 'unhashable type: dict'. Workaround: use page.evaluate sparingly, avoid Python dict literals inline, prefer separate Playwright actions like page.locator(...).bounding_box(). Bob is now ADMIN role after the promote test — if you need bob back to user, run db.users.updateOne({email:'bob@clanchat.app'},{$set:{role:'user'}}) or restart backend (won't help since seed only runs if missing).
rca_of_the_issue: All five user-reported bugs are FIXED and verified: (1) Register #-overlap → cc-input padding moved into @layer components so Tailwind pl-7 utility wins specificity; visual screenshot confirms separation. (2) Search icon overlap → input uses pl-12 (48px) leaving room for icon at left-4. (3) Notif badge → /notifications/counts now returns new_followers + total; useNotifCounts hook polls 30s and badges show on BottomNav (mobile) + DesktopSidebar (desktop). (4) Own profile counters → Profile.jsx fetches /me/followers + /me/following counts and renders Link components with data-testid='my-followers-link'/'my-following-link', gated on isMyProfile so privacy is intact. (5) Demo-account purge → new admin endpoints + SEED_DEMO_DATA=1 env gate for safe re-seed in preview.
